name: Menace Of Destruction
description: Menace of Destruction (MOD) is a Hmong street gang founded in 1988 in Fresno, California. Originally called Masters of Destruction, it is one of the oldest active Asian street gangs in Northern California and the largest Hmong gang in the United States. The gang is involved in murders, shootings, drug trafficking (marijuana and methamphetamine), and weapon trafficking.
